"use strict"; Object.defineProperty(exports, Symbol.toStringTag, { value: "Module" }); const api = require("./api.cjs"); const defineConfig = require("./defineConfig.cjs"); exports.index = api.index; exports.layout = api.layout; exports.physical = api.physical; exports.rootRoute = api.rootRoute; exports.route = api.route; exports.defineVirtualSubtreeConfig = defineConfig.defineVirtualSubtreeConfig; //# sourceMappingURL=index.cjs.map
